company.name: GSK plc (GlaxoSmithKline)
company.subtitle: Total Revenue $42.4B 2025 (+6-7%) | Specialty +18% | Vaccines +2% | HIV +5% | Shingrix $4.6B + Trelegy $4.1B + Nucala $2.5B + Benlysta $1.8B | Depemokimab + Camlipixant + Bepirovirsen 2026
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (~$10B+ op cash flow); Reata $7.2B + Aiolos $1B + recent biotech tuck-ins 2023-25

indications.name: Heritage tail (Avodart + Imitrex + Zantac generics + ROW alliance + Other revenue)

market.notes: True heterogeneous tail (~$8B): Avodart (dutasteride BPH legacy ~$300M), Imitrex (sumatriptan migraine generic), Zantac heritage (litigation overhang), Lamictal/Wellbutrin/Paxil legacy CNS, Hepatitis B (Zinplava/Adasuve), various ROW alliance + co-promote income, Other Revenue (~$1B alliance). Mature.

assets.name: Camlipixant — P2X3 receptor antagonist (refractory chronic cough)

market.notes: Selective P2X3 antagonist. CALM-1/2 Ph3. Class peer: gefapixant (Merck Lyfnua, FDA rejected 2024 due to taste effects). Camlipixant differentiated (P2X3 selective vs gefapixant non-selective). First approved RCC therapy potential.

assets.name: Bepirovirsen (GSK3228836) — anti-HBV ASO (HBsAg loss + functional cure)

indications.name: Chronic hepatitis B functional cure (HBsAg loss)

market.notes: Anti-HBsAg ASO. B-Well Ph3 functional cure (sustained HBsAg loss off therapy). Class peers: bepirovirsen + xalnesiran (Roche siRNA), VIR-2218 + VIR-3434 (Vir Bio).

mega_bear.narrative: Shingrix saturated; HIV vs Biktarvy continued share loss; Trelegy biosim threat; pipeline misses

bear.narrative: Shingrix steady; HIV stable; Trelegy + Nucala + Benlysta drive Specialty; pipeline mixed

base.narrative: Specialty Medicines $20B+; HIV holds; Shingrix + Arexvy combined $6B; pipeline 2/3 wins
events: V Depemokimab approved Q6M severe asthma + CRSwNP

bull.narrative: Camlipixant RCC blockbuster; Bepirovirsen HBV cure transformational; Specialty $25B; depemokimab Q6M dominance
events: V Camlipixant first RCC therapy $3B+ peak
V Depemokimab Q6M dominates IL-5 class

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance; Bepirovirsen HBV cure dominant; full pipeline + Apretude + Penmenvy growth
events: V Bepirovirsen HBV functional cure dominant ($10B+)
V Camlipixant + depemokimab + bepirovirsen all approved

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenue $42.4B (+6-7% AER); 4 segments: Specialty +18%, Vaccines +2%, General +4%, HIV (ViiV) consolidated. 15 'scale opportunities' identified each with peak >£2B by 2025-31.
points: General Medicines £10B (+4%): Trelegy £3.2B + respiratory legacy £2.6B + Augmentin £600M
HIV (ViiV consolidated) £5.5B+: Dovato/Tivicay/Triumeq/Cabenuva LA + Apretude PrEP
Blenrep refile: DREAMM-7/8 Ph3 positive; FDA refile 2025; Q3 launch
Depemokimab Q6M anti-IL-5 long-acting: SWIFT-1/2 + ANCHOR-1/2 Ph3 positive
Camlipixant P2X3 cough Ph3 CALM-1/2: differentiated vs Merck gefapixant FDA-rejected 2024
Bepirovirsen anti-HBsAg ASO: B-Well Ph3 HBV functional cure 2026 readout
ViiV ownership: GSK 78% / Pfizer 7% / Shionogi 10%; consolidated by GSK

nextCatalyst.title: Depemokimab IL-5 LA + Camlipixant RCC + Bepirovirsen HBV cure
thresholds: H1 2026: Depemokimab severe asthma + CRSwNP FDA approvals
H2 2026: Camlipixant CALM-1/2 RCC Ph3 readouts
2026: Bepirovirsen B-Well-1/-2 HBV functional cure Ph3 readouts
2026: Apretude PrEP expansion vs Yeztugo (Gilead lenacapavir Q6M)

risks: Shingrix US peak penetration nearing ceiling (>50% lifetime coverage achieved)
HIV franchise vs Biktarvy (Gilead $13B class leader)
Zantac litigation overhang (settled $2.27B 2024 but California pending)
Camlipixant vs gefapixant Merck FDA rejection 2024 (P2X3 class skepticism)
Bepirovirsen B-Well Ph3 HBV cure mixed signals possible
ViiV minority interest profit-share to Pfizer/Shionogi
